title: Privacy Policy
s1Body: This app is an independent personal project. There is no company behind it — just one developer. For privacy questions, contact: admin@gymlogic.me.
s2Auth: Sign-in identity (email address, name, profile photo) via Google OAuth, processed by Supabase Auth. We use this solely to identify your account.
s2Profile: Training profile (display name, avatar, goal, experience, equipment, age, weight) that you enter voluntarily. Used to personalise workouts and AI suggestions.
s2Workout: Workout data (programs, sessions, exercises, set logs) that you record in the app. This is the core of the service.
s2Analytics: App interaction events (e.g. which features you use) stored in an analytics_events table. These help us understand how the app is used.
s2AI: Workout and program generation requests sent to the Google Gemini API. Prompts include your training profile but not your name or email.
s2Device: Local device storage: a sync queue for offline use, preferences (language, theme, weight unit), and a PWA cache. None of this leaves your device except to sync with our backend.
s3Body: Your data is stored in Supabase (database, auth, file storage). AI generation requests are sent to Google Gemini. The app is hosted on Vercel. These are the only sub-processors. We do not sell or share your data with anyone else.
s4Active: All workout data, your profile, and your avatar are linked to your account and deleted when you delete your account.
s4Analytics: Analytics events are pseudonymised on account deletion — your user ID is removed but the event record remains in aggregate form. We do not retain any event that can be traced back to you personally.
s4Avatar: Avatar files stored in our file storage are permanently deleted when you delete your account.
s5Access: Access and correct your data at any time via Account settings.
s5Delete: Delete your account and all associated data from Account settings. Deletion is immediate and irreversible.
s5Contact: For any other privacy request (data export, objection, complaint), email admin@gymlogic.me.
s6Body: All data is protected by Row-Level Security in the database — you can only read and write your own records. Connections use HTTPS. We do not store passwords (Google handles authentication).
s7Body: If we make material changes, we will update the date at the top of this page. Continued use of the app after a change constitutes acceptance.
